hero.subtitle: Naseer — confectionery made in Uzbekistan. 5 lines, 60 products.

hero.title:
Sweets that
sell themselves
off the shelf.
hero.body: Five product lines, sixty SKUs — caramel, toffee, wafers, chocolate biscuits. Free delivery across Tashkent in our own fleet.

promise.title: Candy that gets recognised on the shelf.
promise.body: We don't talk customers into buying — the product speaks for itself. Consistent quality from batch to batch, clear packaging, an assortment that fits any retail format.

lines.title:
Five characters.
One standard.
lines.body: Each line has its own flavour profile, its own price tier, its own loyal buyer. Click to explore.
lines.lollis: Caramel candies and lollipops. Eight formats — from the single 10 g piece to the 900 g promo drum. Strong cash-zone turnover.
lines.choco-cone: A waffle cone filled with a fatty filling. A range of four flavors and formats confidently holding leading positions in the impulse purchase category.
lines.toffical: Soft chewy toffee. Three flavours, five weights — from 150 g up to a 900 g family pack. Fits any shelf.
lines.choco-bisco: Cream-filled biscuits dipped in chocolate. Four flavours, two pack sizes. Tea-time and gifting both.
lines.bamboonee: Crispy glazed wafers. Three flavours, five weights. Our youngest and fastest-growing line.

production.title:
Our factory.
Our recipes.
Our logistics.
production.body: We don't resell — we manufacture in-house. Quality control at every step, from raw ingredient intake to the label on the wrapper.
production.caption: Packaging line. Modern European equipment.

delivery.title: Tomorrow — on your shelf.
delivery.body: Order by 17:00 — we ship the same day. Free delivery across Tashkent in our own fleet.

final.title:
Ready to put Naseer
on your shelves?
final.body: Send a request — a manager will get back to you within the business day with a price list and help with your first order.

about.title: About
about.description: Naseer is an Uzbek confectionery factory. Five lines, sixty SKUs, our own delivery across Tashkent.
about.heroBody: Naseer is a confectionery factory based in Uzbekistan. Five product lines, sixty SKUs, one team — and every batch passes through the same hands.
about.storyP1: Naseer grew out of a small production site in Tashkent. The idea was simple: make sweets that are honestly worth what they cost and that don't depend on a supplier across the border.
about.storyP2: Over a few years we built five lines — Lollis caramel, Choco Cone wafer cones, Toffical toffee, Choco Bisco wafer biscuits and Bamboonee crispy wafers. Each lives by its own recipe but passes through the same quality standards.
about.storyP3: Today we work with wholesale clients across Tashkent, deliver with our own fleet and slowly expand the geography. No middlemen, no advertising — only the product.
about.quote: Sweets you can put on the shelf next to the best imports without flinching.
about.advantage1Body: Fresh raw materials, modern equipment, batch-by-batch control. The way one box is made repeats across a thousand.
about.advantage2Body: Five lines cover almost any shelf — from kids' caramel to grown-up toffee. Different formats, weights and packaging.
about.advantage3Body: Free delivery across Tashkent with our own fleet. Regional orders — on request.
about.productionTeaserBody: Four stages — intake, line, control, packaging. Each runs to its own protocol.
about.ctaText: We'll explain what fits your store, agree on terms and send a price list. Business hours response.

catalog.title: Catalog
catalog.heroBody: Five product lines, sixty SKUs, one manufacturer. No middlemen and no surprises from one batch to the next.

items.q: How can I contact the company?
items.a: Call +998 99 115 03 02 or fill out the form on the Contacts page. We respond within the business day.

items.q: Do your products have quality certificates?
items.a: Yes, all Naseer products are certified and comply with the quality standards of the Republic of Uzbekistan.

items.q: Which areas do you deliver to?
items.a: We deliver across Tashkent with our own vehicles — free of charge. For other regions, please contact our manager.

items.q: Where can I see the full range?
items.a: The full catalog with flavor and weight filters is available in the Catalog section of our website.

items.q: How do I place an order?
items.a: Fill out the form on the Contacts page or call us — a manager will help you with everything.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.heroBody: A manager will reply within the working day. We'll send the price list and terms over Telegram or email.
contacts.address: Uzbekistan, Tashkent, Chilanzar district, Konditerskaya str. 14
scheduleItems: Orders before 17:00 — shipped the same day

success.title: Request received.

production.title: Production
production.subtitle: We make the best — for the best
production.intro: We don't resell — we manufacture. From raw ingredient intake to the label on the wrapper, the full cycle runs under one roof in Tashkent.
production.heroBody: We don't resell — we manufacture. From raw ingredient intake to the label on the wrapper, the full cycle runs under one roof in Tashkent.
production.stagesTitle: Four steps from a sack of sugar to a case on the shelf.
production.stage1Text: Every batch of sugar, cocoa, dairy components and flavourings is checked on arrival. Supplier paperwork, lab readings, sensory check — without that tick the ingredient doesn't reach the line.
production.stage2Text: European equipment, settled recipes, written technical maps. The operator doesn't improvise — they follow a process that defines temperature, humidity and timing for every stage.
production.stage3Text: Every batch goes through a lab sample and an inline visual check. If anything drifts from spec, the batch doesn't move to packaging. It costs more, but the shelf knows us by exactly that consistency.
production.stage4Text: Airtight wrap, legible date, transparent ingredients, barcode. Cases are built to the retail format — pallet, case, small wholesale. Order in the morning, on the truck by evening.
production.certText: All Naseer products are certified and meet the standards of the Republic of Uzbekistan. Documents are sent on request — your manager attaches them with the price list.
production.ctaTitle:
Want to see it
with your own eyes?
production.ctaText: We arrange a factory walk-through with your account manager. We'll show the lines and answer the awkward questions — no varnish.

footer.tagline: Confectionery from our own factory in Tashkent.

common.notFoundBody: The link may be outdated or the page may have been moved. Here's where most paths lead.
common.errorBody: We're already on it. Try refreshing the page — that usually does it.
